quote.text: Believe you can and you're halfway there.
quote.author: Theodore Roosevelt

quote.text: The only way to do great work is to love what you do.
quote.author: Steve Jobs

quote.text: It does not matter how slowly you go as long as you do not stop.
quote.author: Confucius

quote.text: Success is not final, failure is not fatal: it is the courage to continue that counts.
quote.author: Winston Churchill

quote.text: You are never too old to set another goal or to dream a new dream.
quote.author: C.S. Lewis

quote.text: The secret of getting ahead is getting started.
quote.author: Mark Twain

quote.text: Don't watch the clock; do what it does. Keep going.
quote.author: Sam Levenson

quote.text: Hardships often prepare ordinary people for an extraordinary destiny.
quote.author: C.S. Lewis

quote.text: Believe in yourself and all that you are.
quote.author: Christian D. Larson

quote.text: Act as if what you do makes a difference. It does.
quote.author: William James

quote.text: What you get by achieving your goals is not as important as what you become.
quote.author: Zig Ziglar

quote.text: Keep your face always toward the sunshine, and shadows will fall behind you.
quote.author: Walt Whitman

quote.text: Do one thing every day that scares you.
quote.author: Eleanor Roosevelt

quote.text: You miss 100% of the shots you don't take.
quote.author: Wayne Gretzky

quote.text: The future belongs to those who believe in the beauty of their dreams.
quote.author: Eleanor Roosevelt

quote.text: It always seems impossible until it's done.
quote.author: Nelson Mandela

quote.text: Start where you are. Use what you have. Do what you can.
quote.author: Arthur Ashe

quote.text: Strive not to be a success, but rather to be of value.
quote.author: Albert Einstein

quote.text: Two roads diverged in a wood, and I took the one less traveled by.
quote.author: Robert Frost

quote.text: If you can dream it, you can do it.
quote.author: Walt Disney

quote.text: In the middle of every difficulty lies opportunity.
quote.author: Albert Einstein

quote.text: Life is what happens when you're busy making other plans.
quote.author: John Lennon

quote.text: Spread love everywhere you go. Let no one ever come to you without leaving happier.
quote.author: Mother Teresa

quote.text: When you reach the end of your rope, tie a knot in it and hang on.
quote.author: Franklin D. Roosevelt

quote.text: Always remember that you are absolutely unique. Just like everyone else.
quote.author: Margaret Mead

quote.text: Don't go where the path may lead, go instead where there is no path and leave a trail.
quote.author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

quote.text: You will face many defeats in life, but never let yourself be defeated.
quote.author: Maya Angelou

quote.text: The greatest glory in living lies not in never falling, but in rising every time we fall.
quote.author: Nelson Mandela

quote.text: In the end, it's not the years in your life that count. It's the life in your years.
quote.author: Abraham Lincoln

quote.text: Never let the fear of striking out keep you from playing the game.
quote.author: Babe Ruth

quote.text: Darkness cannot drive out darkness; only light can do that.
quote.author: Martin Luther King Jr.

quote.text: The best time to plant a tree was 20 years ago. The second best time is now.
quote.author: Chinese Proverb

quote.text: An unexamined life is not worth living.
quote.author: Socrates

quote.text: Spread your wings and let the fairy in you fly!
quote.author: Rumi

quote.text: You only live once, but if you do it right, once is enough.
quote.author: Mae West
